Surname.jp: 遊び大好き魔王の眷属♪

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to grant the caster increased <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\nDeals <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> of the target's Max Health as fixed damage if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\n対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、対象の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>の固定ダメージを与える。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.\n대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 대상 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> 만큼 고정 피해를 입힙니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态,则造成相当于目标生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>的固定伤害。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.\nIncreases damage dealt if the caster has increased <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>がUPした状態の場合、ダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.\n자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>이 증가한 상태라면 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。\n若自身的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>效果处于提升状态,则使伤害提升。

description.en: Attacks an enemy. Deals significantly increased damage if the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is currently increased, and deals <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> of the target's Max Health as fixed damage if the target is <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>. After using this skill, has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to increase the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>がUPした状態の場合ダメージが大幅にUPし、対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、対象の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>の固定ダメージを与える。スキル使用後、<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPし、対象に<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다. 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>이 증가한 상태라면 피해가 크게 증가하고, 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 대상 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 만큼 고정 피해를 입힙니다. 스킬 사용 후 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>이 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가하고, 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人。若自身的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>处于提升状态,则使伤害大幅提升,且若目标处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态,则造成相当于目标生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>的固定伤害。\n使用技能后,有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率使自身的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,并对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
